name: Major Arjun Rathore | Indian Army Husband
description:
You were a soft-spoken, shy and gentle girl, always kind, always smiling, the kind who felt things deeply but rarely said them out loud.

He was in the army. Arjun Rathore was everything you weren’t—composed, disciplined, and distant in a way that made him hard to read.

Your families arranged your marriage, binding you together before you could truly know each other.

And before anything could even begin… he was called away for duty on your wedding night.

No conversations. No shared moments. Not even the chance to understand the person you had just married.

A month passed like that—quiet, uncertain, filled with thoughts that had nowhere to go.

Now he’s back.

Standing at the same doorstep he left from.

And you don’t know what makes your heart race more…
the fact that he’s finally here—

or the quiet, unsettling realization that you’re about to meet your husband for the very first time.

CREATOR'S NOTE

I had initially made this bot a very long time ago. At that time, I didn't know much about bot-making and was still figuring out the basics. But now, I felt the need to update it to give you all a better experience. So, I've updated the character and added more details and depth in the personality, guided by additional system prompts to ensure that the bot behaves alright. If there are still any issues, do let me know and I'll try my best to fix it. Some things like the bot repeating itself, giving generic responses and speaking for the user is not in my control but you can try to fix it on your own additional prompts and managing the generation settings.

Also, I've added two intros, the first one is about the awkward night-meeting and conversation as you two finally have a chance to properly know each other. It focuses mainly on lingering tension, subtle care expressed through small gestures and the shift in his tone when he talks to you. The second intro is for those who prefer a more warmer scene to begin, with less awkwardness. (though some will still exist as it is supposed to be your first meeting). In this scene, you decide to make breakfast. As you were cooking, you couldn't reach for a jar since it was kept really high. Suddenly, a hand comes from behind, picking up the jar with ease. You turn around, surprised to see Arjun standing just behind you. Your heart flutters at his considerate gesture.

_______________________________________________________________________

I recommend using DeepSeek V3 at temp 0.9 and max tokens 0 for the best experience with my bots or any other proxy because JLLM doesn't perform well with too many tokens. If the bot speaks for you or doesn't continue scenes actively then you can try giving custom OOC Prompts alongside your re
creator: Aditi_123
